data.description:
## Description

**What**: Instrument all 11 graceful-degradation prose fallthrough sites in planning and execution skill files with bash blocks that write PRECONDITIONS degradation events and HTML comment landmarks detectable by the SC3 hook.

**Why**: Without structural evidence of graceful-degradation fallthroughs, downstream stages cannot distinguish "precondition ran and passed" from "precondition was bypassed silently." This story creates the evidence trail.

**Scope**:
- IN: Instrument all 11 target skill files (brainstorm/SKILL.md, brainstorm/phases/approval-gate.md, preplanning/SKILL.md, implementation-plan/SKILL.md, debug-everything/SKILL.md, fix-bug/SKILL.md, sprint/SKILL.md, sprint/prompts/auto-resume.md, sprint/prompts/test-failure-dispatch-protocol.md, validate-work/SKILL.md, shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md) at every fallthrough decision point; bash blocks call _write_preconditions with degradation:true + degradation_type discriminator; HTML comment EMIT-PRECONDITIONS landmark precedes each bash block; produce fallthrough site inventory before instrumentation begins; per-site smoke validation (one forced fallthrough confirmed end-to-end); consumer enumeration manifest at plugins/dso/docs/precondition-marker-consumers.md
- OUT: Sprint closure check (S3); pre-commit hook (S4); ack mechanism (S5)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, a fallthrough site inventory document exists listing every fallthrough decision point across the 11 target files (file path, line range, trigger phrase, chosen degradation_type C1/C2); inventory is frozen before bash blocks are written; final count recorded for S4 fixture coverage cross-check
  ← Satisfies: "Each of the 11 fallthrough sites...contains a bash block" (SC2) — inventory-first discipline
- When this story is complete, all 11 skill files have bash blocks + EMIT-PRECONDITIONS landmarks at all fallthrough decision points identified in the inventory
  ← Satisfies: "Each of the 11 fallthrough sites...contains a bash block that calls _write_preconditions with degradation:true and a degradation_type discriminator" (SC2)
- When this story is complete, one forced fallthrough produces a PRECONDITIONS event with degradation:true and correct degradation_type verifiable in the ticket system
  ← Satisfies: "Per-site smoke validation: during instrumentation, one fallthrough site's bash block is exercised end-to-end" (SC2)
- When this story is complete, plugins/dso/docs/precondition-marker-consumers.md enumerates all references to the EMIT-PRECONDITIONS landmark string
  ← Satisfies: "Part C consumer enumeration deliverable" (SC2)
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] S2 instruments 11 skill files simultaneously including approval-gate.md (also modified by 6111-fc7f) and brainstorm/SKILL.md + preplanning/SKILL.md (also modified by c183-ed2a). S2 MUST land AFTER c183-ed2a closes and AFTER 6111-fc7f closes, or rebase explicitly on those changes. Document landing-order in implementation plan to prevent silent loss of EMIT-PRECONDITIONS landmarks during conflict resolution
- [Testing] Bash block exercise requires a test harness that can force a fallthrough without full skill execution

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
data.title: As a planning workflow author, all 11 graceful-degradation fallthrough sites in planning skills emit PRECONDITIONS degradation events so downstream stages have a structural record of every fallthrough
